selectionNote: Featured weekend plan, family dinner, boutique, office deadline, and city tour demos regenerated from the Prime multi-speaker set.

entries.direction: Casual, energetic, and opinionated pacing with playful handoffs.
entries.summary: Three friends debate weekend movie plans with quick, expressive turns.
entries.translation: A friend pitches a sci-fi blockbuster, another pushes for an indie drama, and the third lands on doing both.
entries.castSummary: Alex: Ethan US Male + Jordan: Ava US Female + Casey: Grace UK Elder

lines.speaker: Alex
lines.text: <tone="excited">Hey guys! Have you seen the trailer for the new sci-fi epic? It looks absolutely stunning!</tone>

lines.speaker: Jordan
lines.text: <tone="skeptical">I do not know, Alex. <pause="300ms"/> The last one was all special effects and no plot. I would rather catch that new indie drama.</tone>

lines.speaker: Casey
lines.text: <tone="diplomatic"><mood="calm">Why not both? We can do the blockbuster tonight and the drama on Sunday.</mood> <tone="playful">Plus, I am really just here for the popcorn!</tone></tone>

entries.direction: Warm, authentic, and relatable pacing with natural family dynamics.
entries.summary: A mother calls everyone to dinner while the son delays and the father teases him.
entries.translation: A warm family moment where urgency, distraction, and gentle authority blend naturally.
entries.castSummary: Mother: Meera India Female + Rohan: Adi India Boy + Father: Arjun India Male

lines.speaker: Mother
lines.text: <tone="shouting_softly">रोहन! खाने की मेज पर आओ, खाना ठंडा हो रहा है!</tone>

lines.speaker: Rohan
lines.text: <tone="distracted"><mood="busy">बस दो मिनट मम्मी! मैं अपना गेम बस खत्म ही करने वाला हूँ!</mood></tone>

lines.speaker: Father
lines.text: <tone="authoritative"><mood="teasing">बेटा, तुम्हारी माँ की डाँट से अच्छा है कि तुम गेम अभी बंद कर दो। <pause="400ms"/> और वैसे भी, आज खुशबू बहुत अच्छी आ रही है!</mood></tone>

entries.direction: Polite and vibrant delivery with helpful, expressive customer-service pacing.
entries.summary: A tourist asks for a smaller jacket and the shopkeeper finds the final piece in stock.
entries.translation: A customer asks for another size in blue and the shopkeeper returns with the last available one.
entries.castSummary: Customer: Valentina Spain Female + Shopkeeper: Zephyr Spain Female

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: <tone="curious">¡Perdón! Esta chaqueta es hermosa. ¿La tienen en una talla más pequeña, tal vez en azul?</tone>

lines.speaker: Shopkeeper
lines.text: <tone="helpful"><mood="joyful">¡Claro que sí! Déjame revisar en el almacén. <pause="500ms"/> Estás de suerte, <tone="excited">¡es la última que nos queda y te verás increíble!</tone></mood></tone>

entries.direction: Professional but exhausted pacing with clear support between coworkers.
entries.summary: Two colleagues close a late-night presentation and hand off final review.
entries.translation: One teammate finishes the slides and the other reassures them while taking final checks.
entries.castSummary: Tanaka: Achernar Japan Female + Sato: Yui Japan Female

lines.speaker: Tanaka
lines.text: <tone="tired">佐藤さん、プレゼンの資料はやっと終わりました。チェックをお願いできますか？</tone>

lines.speaker: Sato
lines.text: <tone="encouraging"><mood="focused">お疲れ様です、田中さん！ <pause="400ms"/> 本当に助かりました。 <tone="determined">あとは私が最終確認をしておきますから、今日はもう帰って休んでください。</tone></mood></tone>

entries.direction: Sophisticated and wonder-filled pacing with a warm romantic close.
entries.summary: A guide introduces the Eiffel Tower while a couple responds with awe and gratitude.
entries.translation: A guide presents historical context and two tourists react with amazement as the tower begins to sparkle.
entries.castSummary: Guide: Pierre France Male + Tourist1: Schedar France Male + Tourist2: Oliver UK Male

lines.speaker: Guide
lines.text: <tone="informative">Et voilà! Devant vous, la Dame de Fer. Elle a été construite pour l'Exposition Universelle de 1889.</tone>

lines.speaker: Tourist1
lines.text: <tone="amazed"><mood="breathless">C'est encore plus grand que ce que j'imaginais... C'est magnifique, n'est-ce pas ?</mood></tone>

lines.speaker: Tourist2
lines.text: <tone="romantic"><mood="soft">Absolument. <pause="500ms"/> Merci de nous avoir amenés ici juste au moment où elle commence à briller.</mood></tone>
